prompt: For each product class, compare the average revenue per unit sold during promotions vs non-promotions throughout 2021. Rank the product classes by the absolute difference in average revenue per unit between the two conditions, and include the total number of transactions for each group.

effective_run_params.visualization_goal: Bar chart comparing average revenue per unit (promo vs non-promo) for each product class in 2021, sorted by absolute difference descending.
effective_run_params.prompt: For each product class, compare the average revenue per unit sold during promotions vs non-promotions throughout 2021. Rank the product classes by the absolute difference in average revenue per unit between the two conditions, and include the total number of transactions for each group.
